hero.title: Authentic Tourism
hero.subtitle: Authentic community tourism in Rio de Janeiro's favela. Cultural, safe and responsible experiences.

AboutPreview.title: Much more than a tour
AboutPreview.description_1: You will step onto the real set that inspired **FIFA Street**, **The Incredible Hulk** movie, and **Snoop Dogg & Pharrell**'s music video. Favela is not just a favela; it is a global pop culture icon.
AboutPreview.description_2: Here, safety is absolute and the experience is authentic. Guided by locals, you will discover the true soul of Rio de Janeiro, with breathtaking views and stories no ordinary guide can tell.
AboutPreview.description_impact: By choosing Favela-República, you reinvest directly in the community. Our sustainable tourism generates local income, preserves our culture, and creates real opportunities for residents.
AboutPreview.trustedSubtitle: Setting of FIFA Street and rated with excellence:

Testimonials.title: What our visitors say
Testimonials.subtitle: More than 1000 visitors have lived this experience

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find answers about the tour and visiting the favela.

q1.question: Is it safe to visit the favela?
q1.answer: Yes, you will always be accompanied by a local guide. They will ensure your experience is safe and amazing.

q2.question: How do I book a tour?
q2.answer: The fastest way is via WhatsApp. Just click the green button on any page and send a message with: your desired date, preferred time, number of people, and the tour you're interested in. Our team responds in a few minutes during business hours.

q3.question: What payment methods are accepted?
q3.answer: We accept: PIX (preferential), cash (reals), dollars, credit and debit cards, and Wise. Payment can be made on the day of the tour or in advance.

q4.question: Can I bring my camera and phone?
q4.answer: Yes, you can bring a camera and phone to record the tour; it is very safe. To take photos of residents, especially children, always ask for permission first. Our guides will help you with this during the tour.

q5.question: Does the price include everything?
q5.answer: The price includes: a bilingual local guide, round-trip transport from the meeting point to the favela, 360° video, and photos taken by the team. It does not include: meals, drinks, or tips (optional).

q6.question: What languages do you offer the tours in?
q6.answer: Our guides speak Portuguese, English, Spanish, and French. Let us know your preferred language when booking so we can ensure an appropriate guide.

q7.question: What should I wear and bring?
q7.answer: We recommend: comfortable shoes, light clothes, sunscreen, cash or card, and a camera/phone to record your experience.

q8.question: Can I buy something from residents during the tour?
q8.answer: Yes, there are several local shops along the way! You can buy shirts, food, drinks, and other things. Our guides will show you the best places. Bring cash or a card.

q9.question: What is the minimum and maximum group size?
q9.answer: The minimum is 2 people per tour. The maximum varies and can reach up to 40 people.

q10.question: Does the tour happen if it rains?
q10.answer: Light tours operate normally with drizzle. In case of heavy rain or storms, we will contact you to reschedule at no additional cost.

q11.question: Where is the meeting point?
q11.answer: The meeting point is at Rua do Catete, 153 - Catete (In front of the Museum of the Republic). It's easy to get there by Uber/taxi or metro (Catete station). We send the exact location via WhatsApp after booking confirmation, along with detailed instructions on how to get there.

NotFound.title: Path Not Found
NotFound.description: It seems you have wandered into an unknown alley. In the favela, every path has a return, and we will help you find your way.
NotFound.helpSubtitle: Talk to us directly on WhatsApp
